name: Addtech AB (publ.)
summary: Addtech AB (publ.) operates as a technology trading company in Sweden, Denmark, Finland, Norway, and internationally. The company's Automation segment markets and sells intelligent solutions, subsystems, and components to industrial automation and infrastructure sector, including solutions for robotics, control systems, sensors, and industrial and communication networks; and designs and manufactures equipment for pharmaceutical and diagnostic industries. Its Components segment markets and sells components, sub-systems, and equipment and advanced process systems for mechanics, electromechanics, hydraulics, electronics, and chemical and pharmaceutical applications. The company's Energy segment markets and sells electricity transmission and distribution products, and products in the areas of electrical safety, electrical installation, and connection technology primarily for the energy and electrical installation market through specifiers and electricity wholesalers; and supplies special cables and cable accessories for industrial and mining applications. Its Industrial Process segment markets and sells solutions, sub-systems, and components for the manufacturing and processing industries, as well as manufactures customized gaskets and seals; and supplies products and technical solutions for power transmission and conveyor applications, as well as flue gas purification and heat recovery systems. The company's Power Solutions segment develops, markets, and sells components and system solutions that enable power supply, as well as operates and controls movements or energy flows, such as battery solutions and products used in the interaction between humans and machines; and supplies seats and peripheral components for machines, buses, and trains. Its Power Solutions segment serves customers in the fields of special vehicles, telecoms, environmental technology, and medical technology. The company was founded in 1906 and is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
